remember: Students will be able to recall the names and locations of the major oceans and continents.
Students will be able to identify the percentage of water and land in the Earth's surface.
understand: Students will be able to explain the distribution of oceans and continents across the globe.
Students will be able to describe the relative positions of the continents and oceans.
apply: Students will be able to use maps and globes to locate and identify the major oceans and continents.
Students will be able to apply their knowledge of ocean and continent distribution to understand global climate patterns.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the factors that influence the distribution of oceans and continents.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the geographical features of different continents and oceans.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the importance of the distribution of oceans and continents in shaping our environment.
To recognize the role of plate tectonics in the distribution of continents and oceans.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests the ability to identify and locate the major oceans and continents on a map.
The board exam assesses the understanding of the distribution of oceans and continents and their impact on global climate patterns.
